protection, and many other customizable options." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="370" x="60" y="-490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Metadata is limited to:
- Object Class
- Object Type
(No timestamp, owner, permissions, etc)
Lighter-weight metadata allows better
scaling and reduced overhead

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 315px; margin-left: 4px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #28463D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #28463D; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Containers have many types, supporting popular data layouts.
POSIX containers implement the DAOS File System (DFS),
emulating POSIX via abstractions over the native libdaos library
Container settings also control redundancy, sharding, data
protection, and many other customizable options.
